page: Microsoft Azure M416s_12_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the MSHighMemoryv3 family. It features 416 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel processors and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The server is equipped with 11,400.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 27.4 GB of RAM per core.

This server configuration does not include local storage or onboard GPUs, relying instead on external storage solutions. It is designated as Premium Storage capable, allowing connection to high-performance remote storage volumes. Additionally, the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the massive memory footprint and high count of dedicated vCPUs, this instance is designed for workloads requiring extreme resource density. The qualitative cost profile reflects its position as a high-end, memory-optimized resource. It is suited for large-scale in-memory databases, massive enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy data-processing workloads that require holding terabytes of data in system memory.
description: Microsoft Azure M416s_12_v3 is a highly specialized, memory-optimized server from the MSHighMemoryv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. Built on the x86_64 architecture with Intel processors, it provides 416 dedicated vCPUs and an exceptionally large memory capacity of 11,400.0 GB, which equates to approximately 27.4 GB of RAM per core. The instance does not feature local storage or integrated GPUs but is Premium Storage capable, enabling high-performance remote storage configurations. It also includes zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This server is designed for enterprise-grade workloads requiring massive memory capacity and substantial compute resources, such as large-scale in-memory databases, data warehousing, and complex enterprise resource planning applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M416s_12_v3 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring 416 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 11,400 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability for massive enterprise database workloads.

tagline: A massive memory-optimized virtual server featuring hundreds of dedicated cores and terabytes of RAM for enterprise-scale in-memory workloads.

11,400.0 GB of system memory providing 27.4 GB per core
Premium Storage capable for high-performance remote disk attachment
